languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

languages.text: "Клешни прочь, пузатый господин — мне их Леди Теодора пожаловала! Кстати о псайкерском проклятии: передавай Нунциусу пламенный привет от друзей с той стороны. Они насчет него тоже заинтригованы".

"Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."
languages.original_text: "Клешни прочь, пузатый господин — мне их Леди Теодора пожаловала! Кстати о псайкерском проклятии: передавай Нунциусу пламенный привет от друзей с той стороны. Они насчет него тоже заинтригованы".

traits.locale_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Potbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

"Keep your claws to yourself, Master Potbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

languages.text: «Guárdese esas garras, maestro barriga de engranaje: ¡Lady Theodora me dio estos aumentos! Hablando de la maldición psíquica, unos amigos del otro lado envían un cariñoso saludo a Nuncius. Ellos también tienen curiosidad por él».
languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

traits.locale_text: «Guárdese esas garras, maestro barriga de engranaje: ¡Lady Theodora me dio estos aumentos! Hablando de la maldición psíquica, unos amigos del otro lado envían un cariñoso saludo a Nuncius. Ellos también tienen curiosidad por él».

languages.text: 「その爪をしまっておきな、歯車腹の旦那――このオーグメティックはテオドラ様が下さったものさ！ サイカーの呪いといえば、向こう側の友人たちが、ヌンキウスによろしくってさ。あいつらも彼に興味津々なんだよ」
languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

traits.locale_text: 「その爪をしまっておきな、歯車腹の旦那――このオーグメティックはテオドラ様が下さったものさ！ サイカーの呪いといえば、向こう側の友人たちが、ヌンキウスによろしくってさ。あいつらも彼に興味津々なんだよ」

languages.text: “收好你的爪子，大铁肚贤者，这些植入物是西奥多拉夫人赐予我的！说到灵能者的诅咒，来自彼岸的一些朋友也向努恩修斯致以了最诚挚的问候。他们对他也很好奇。”
languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

traits.locale_text: “收好你的爪子，大铁肚贤者，这些植入物是西奥多拉夫人赐予我的！说到灵能者的诅咒，来自彼岸的一些朋友也向努恩修斯致以了最诚挚的问候。他们对他也很好奇。”

languages.text: "Behaltet Eure Klauen bei Euch, Meister Ritzelbauch ... ich erhielt diese Augmentationen von Lady Theodora! Apropos Psionikerfluch ... einige Freunde von der anderen Seite lassen Nuncios herzlich grüßen. Sie sind von ihm ebenfalls fasziniert."
languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

traits.locale_text: "Behaltet Eure Klauen bei Euch, Meister Ritzelbauch ... ich erhielt diese Augmentationen von Lady Theodora! Apropos Psionikerfluch ... einige Freunde von der anderen Seite lassen Nuncios herzlich grüßen. Sie sind von ihm ebenfalls fasziniert."

languages.text: « Bas les pattes, maître ventripotent. C'est dame Theodora qui m'a donné ces augmentations ! En parlant de la malédiction des psykers, des amis de l'autre côté envoient à Nuncius leurs salutations les plus chaleureuses. Ils éprouvent une certaine curiosité à son égard. »
languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."

traits.locale_text: « Bas les pattes, maître ventripotent. C'est dame Theodora qui m'a donné ces augmentations ! En parlant de la malédiction des psykers, des amis de l'autre côté envoient à Nuncius leurs salutations les plus chaleureuses. Ils éprouvent une certaine curiosité à son égard. »

languages.text: "Pençelerini kendine sakla Üstat Dişli Göbek, bu ogmentleri bana Leydi Theodora verdi! Ruhsezer lanetinden bahsetmişken... Öteki taraftaki bazı arkadaşlar, Nuncius'a en içten selamlarını gönderiyor. Onlar da onu merak ediyor."
languages.original_text: "Keep your claws to yourself, Master Cogbelly — Lady Theodora gave me these augments! Speaking of the psyker curse, some friends on the other side send Nuncius their warmest greetings. They're curious about him, too."
